name: Mauricio Ruffy
title: UFC Lightweight Fighter
bio: Brazilian mixed martial artist competing in the UFC lightweight division. Ruffy grew up in Alagoas, Brazil, built his professional career in São Paulo, and became known for explosive striking performances in the UFC.
faith: Ruffy has spoken publicly and repeatedly about Jesus Christ changing his life. His official UFC profile says, 'When I let Jesus into my life, everything changed,' and that he feels called to help people be transformed by the love of Christ. After a 2026 UFC victory, he quoted John 3:16 and said, 'Jesus saved my life' before urging listeners to give their lives to Jesus. Because he is a living and still-active public figure, this profile is included as a current public testimony rather than a final judgment on his whole story.
